# Zscaler Security Operations | Zscaler

**Source:** https://www.zscaler.com/products-and-solutions/security-operations
**Captured:** 2026-04-25 via WebFetch.

---

## H1 / Title

**Outpace Evolving Adversaries with Agentic SecOps**

## Value Proposition

Leverage Zscaler data with inline controls, third-party data, and AI agents to reduce risk and contain threats faster. Enables organizations to assess risk, detect threats, and contain breaches in **minutes rather than days** through machine-speed responses powered by contextualized network telemetry.

## Core Suite Components

### Exposure Management
- **Asset Exposure Management (AEM)** — visibility into organizational assets, coverage-gap identification, CMDB hygiene
- **Unified Vulnerability Management (UVM)** — unified security findings with business context for risk prioritization + automated remediation
- **Risk360** — risk quantification across Zscaler systems with configuration-change recommendations
- **Continuous Threat Exposure Management (CTEM)** — scalable program spanning assets, data, identity, cloud, SaaS

### Threat Management
- **Deception Technology** — honeypots on endpoints and infrastructure
- **Red Canary Managed Detection & Response (MDR)** — industry-leading MDR service post-acquisition
- **Managed Threat Hunting** — expert-led 24×7 hunting for sophisticated threats and anomalies

## Red Canary Integration

Post-acquisition, Red Canary MDR functions as an AI-powered augmentation for SOC teams. Operates initially as a separate business unit within Zscaler. Combined with Zscaler's high-quality data + ThreatLabz intelligence to deliver an "agentic SOC" combining AI-driven workflows with human expertise.

## Key Marketing-Cited Metrics

- Threats identified and stopped **10× faster**
- **99.7% threat accuracy** rating
- Training data: **11+ years** of high-fidelity threat detection and SecOps workflows

## Suite Positioning

This is the unifying brand for Zscaler's Exposure Management + Threat Management offerings. Maps to:
- Tier 1 deep-dive products in this skill: Risk360, Deception (T2a)
- Tier 2 awareness products: AEM, UVM, EASM (T2b)
- Architectural pillar: **Agentic SecOps** (the AI-automation layer)
